_meta.note: Institutional memory of decisions so the same discussions don't recur. Seeded from the Knowledge Discovery engagement.

accepted.decision: KUR (Decision-producing Knowledge / Raw Information) is MATRIYA's north-star KPI
LAW-EVIDENCE-001: no ranking/board line may exceed the evidence quality it is derived from
KUR audit uses 6 validation gates J0-J5 before any ranking is trusted; read-only metadata pass = v0.2
Build a System State / MRI layer (this folder) as MATRIYA's structural self-memory; morning run is differential
MATRIYA V5 vision canonized (knowledge->discovery engine): 5 knowledge layers + intelligence engines. Canonical doc: MATRIYA/VISION-V5.md; evidence-gated gap map: MATRIYA/VISION-V5-GAP-MAP.md

verified_findings_as_constraints.finding: Priority ERP / LIMS are ABSENT — do not assume or build integration
matriya-system is an empty scaffold — do not treat as a live service
Production RAG is empty — knowledge lives in Drive/Excel/email, not the platform
public/cockpit/snapshot.json is statically authored — its claimed generator (npm run cockpit:export in matriya-back) does not exist; do not treat cockpit as live engine output
Two disjoint vector spaces: rag_documents vector(384, local) vs management_vector vector(1536, OpenAI) — V5 unified retrieval requires federation or migration

pending.decision: Parse the 13 robust-core files to E3, then finalize Top-20 (J3-J5)
Re-enable / reconfigure the Google Drive intake sensor

deprecated_or_deferred.decision: Knowledge Graph -> Ontology: DEFERRED until measurement layer (KUR) is trusted
